name: Oriental Turkey Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the turkey breast and bell pepper into strips.
2. Slice the pea pods lengthwise.
3. Cut the carrots diagonally.
4. Chop the onion.
5. In a large bowl, mix together the salad dressing, soy sauce, and ginger.
6. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and stir until combined.
7. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
8. Serve the salad on lettuce-covered platter.
